Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment To Change Plaintiff'S Name And Order Thereon
Off Calendar Nov-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LHR, INC., ASSIGNEE OF FINANCIAL PARTNERS CREDIT's Motion To Amend Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment To Change Plaintiff's Name And Order Thereon.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The moving party did not serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, plus 5 calendar days for service by mail within the State of California, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Suzanne Marie Corveau's Claim Of Exemption is Granted. The judgment debtor has shown that all of her earnings are exempt. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
